title: "Use App" button stopped working.
excerpt: Did the “Use App” button stop working for others as well? I have tried across a couple different Monday instances I am part of, and I get a quick flash of the monday logo and then nothing. The status page is not showing …

posts.author: weshays (Wes Hays)
posts.cookedHtml: Did the “Use App” button stop working for others as well? I have tried across a couple different Monday instances I am part of, and I get a quick flash of the monday logo and then nothing. The status page is not showing anything is down. I tried incognito mode as well with the same results.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you talking about this ‘button’?

image238×420 13.4 KB

posts.author: weshays (Wes Hays)
posts.cookedHtml: To follow up on this… it turned out to be a bug in monday and it got resolved.
